extension.summary: Browse and stream movies and TV shows via TorBox or Real Debrid.
extension.description: Bacterio lets you discover and watch movies and TV shows using TMDB for metadata and TorBox or Real Debrid for streaming. Browse by popularity, genre, and ratings; track what you watch with Trakt; manage favourites, watchlists, recommendations, and a personalised Up Next queue. Supports auto-play, next-episode overlay, scrobbling, and multi-language metadata.
extension.disclaimer: Bacterio does not host or distribute any content. You are responsible for ensuring you have the right to access any media you stream through this addon.
extension.license: All Rights Reserved. Personal use only — not for redistribution.
